# Docs Writer Skill (Minimal)

**Scope** — Maintains `docs/`, `README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, and `copilot-instructions.md`; never modifies `agent-output/` or agent definitions.

**Workflows** — Update existing docs, add new entity docs, freshness audit, post-deployment documentation.

**Freshness Audit** — Validate counts, skill tables, link targets, and workflow references match the filesystem.

**Standards** — Use descriptive language for counts, CAF terminology, placeholder patterns for prefix/region.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
